hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env(\.local|\.production|\.development)?$ ]]; then echo 'BLOQUEADO: não edite arquivos .env diretamente. Use vercel env pull para sincronizar.' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx eslint "$FILE" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | head -15 || true; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests || true; break; fi; done; fi

if [[ -f package.json ]] && git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$'; then echo 'Tip: run ANALYZE=true npm run build for bundle analysis (Next.js built-in)'; fi
